title: DTO Pattern — Vehicle API
description:
### Your Task

Build a Vehicle CRUD API using the DTO pattern. More reps!

### Requirements

- `Vehicle` entity: `id` (Long), `make` (String), `model` (String), `year` (Integer), `color` (String), `price` (Double)
- `VehicleRequestDTO`: `make`, `model`, `year`, `color`, `price`
- `VehicleResponseDTO`: `id`, `label` (year + " " + make + " " + model), `color`, `price`
- `VehicleController` at `/api/vehicles`

### Endpoints

- `GET /api/vehicles` → List of VehicleResponseDTO (200)
- `GET /api/vehicles/{id}` → VehicleResponseDTO (200 or 404)
- `POST /api/vehicles` → Accept VehicleRequestDTO, return VehicleResponseDTO (201)
- `PUT /api/vehicles/{id}` → Accept VehicleRequestDTO, return VehicleResponseDTO (200 or 404)
- `DELETE /api/vehicles/{id}` → 204 or 404

### Key Concepts

- Computed field: `label` = year + " " + make + " " + model
- Example: year=2024, make="Toyota", model="Camry" → label="2024 Toyota Camry"
hints: Integer.toString(year) or String.valueOf(year) to convert year to string
Same pattern as challenges 04 and 05 — this should be faster now
